blended.narrative: Tamarack is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 38".
